title: Supporting files for "Estimating the number of contributors to DNA mixtures provides a novel tool for ecology"
author: Sethi, Suresh Andrew
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Supporting files for Sethi et al. Methods in Ecology and Evolution, in press.  Contents include an alternative likelihood formulation for a DNA mixture estimator, associated R script to implement the likelihood, pcr multiplex conditions for yellow perch, and a supplemental figure.
steps_raw: Supporting files for Sethi et al. Methods in Ecology and Evolution, in press.  Contents include an alternative likelihood formulation for a DNA mixture estimator, associated R script to implement the likelihood, pcr multiplex conditions for yellow perch, and a supplemental figure.
